info.title: Meziantou.DeltaBuild
info.description: Delta Build — incremental CI build tool

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate a subset solution/build file for incremental CI builds

options.name: --input
options.description: Path to the input file (SLN, SLNX, Traversal SDK, or single project file)

options.name: --output
options.description: Path for the output file (SLN, SLNX, or Traversal SDK). Format is inferred from extension.

options.name: --repository
options.description: Path to the git repository (default: current directory) [default: .]

options.name: --base-commit
options.description: The base commit SHA (default: auto-detected via merge-base)

options.name: --base-branch
options.description: The base branch for merge-base detection (default: auto-detected from GitHub Actions PR context or remote)

options.name: --working-tree
options.description: Compare the base commit against the current working directory instead of a commit. Includes staged, unstaged, and untracked files. When set, --head-commit is ignored.

options.name: --include
options.description: Glob patterns to filter which projects to consider (repeatable)

options.name: --full-rebuild-trigger
options.description: Glob patterns for files that trigger a full rebuild of ALL projects (replaces defaults when provided, repeatable)

options.name: --hierarchical-rebuild-trigger
options.description: Glob patterns for files that trigger a rebuild of projects in the same folder hierarchy (replaces defaults when provided, repeatable). Default: **/global.json, **/nuget.config, **/.editorconfig

options.name: --RoslynWorkspace
options.description: The analysis engine to use: MSBuild (default), RoslynWorkspace (uses Roslyn, more compatible), or StaticGraph (passes input file directly to MSBuild Static Graph API) [default: MSBuild]

options.name: --traversal-before-import
options.description: Path of the import added before the ProjectReference items in the generated Traversal SDK file (default: <output-name>.before.proj)

options.name: --traversal-sdk-version
options.description: Optional version appended to the Traversal SDK in generated Traversal files (for example: Microsoft.Build.Traversal/4.1.82). When omitted, no version suffix is added.

options.name: --traversal-after-import
options.description: Path of the import added after the ProjectReference items in the generated Traversal SDK file (default: <output-name>.after.proj)
